confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all transfers and placements. All objects successfully moved with no visible drops or penalties. Timing estimation based on visible instrument movements and task progression.
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth bilateral coordination, efficient transfers, and rapid task completion. All 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions without penalties.
strengths: Fast completion time of 45 seconds (expert level)
No dropped objects or placement errors
improvement_suggestions: Already performing at expert level with minimal room for improvement
